description: file_id and file provenance originate from inventory table
raw point channels are direct imported rows with no cleaning transforms
clean table is deterministic row-preserving transform of raw by cleaning policy
cleaning branch reason trust and warning codes are mapped from cleaning audit outputs
segment columns are annotations for context and are not part of cleaning transforms
derived variables are computed only from clean inputs and carried identity columns
derived units and dimensionless rules are enforced by explicit unit contract
default observables source is derived channels with declared methods and provenance fields
direct clean based observables are explicit exceptions with source_columns and method provenance
observable_name definition source_columns and method descriptors must be explicit
